totalRecords.description: Total number of audit schedules included in this widget payload.

generatedAt.description: Payload generation timestamp in ISO-8601 format.

complianceBuckets.description: Section 1: Auditees grouped into 3 low-compliance buckets (0–15%, 15–25%, 25–50%) with auditee counts per occupied bucket.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this section represents.

buckets.description: Up to 3 compliance buckets. Only include a bucket if its auditeeCount > 0.

top3OverallLowPerformers.description: Section 2: The 3 auditees with the absolute lowest achieved compliance percentage across all buckets combined, sorted ascending by achievedPercentage.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this section represents.

items.description: Top 3 lowest-scoring auditees overall, sorted ascending by achievedPercentage.

zoneComplianceOverview.description: Section 2: Per-zone count of audit schedules where Achieved Percentage < 50%, sorted by count descending.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this section represents.

lowComplianceThreshold.description: The threshold used to classify low-compliance audits (50.0).

zones.description: Zones sorted descending by lowComplianceAuditCount (most to least low-compliance). Include all zones with lowComplianceAuditCount > 0.

bucketMin.description: Lower bound of the compliance percentage range (inclusive).

bucketMax.description: Upper bound of the compliance percentage range (exclusive for intermediate buckets, inclusive for last).

auditeeCount.description: Total number of auditees in this compliance bucket.

auditeeName.description: Name of the auditee entity (from Auditee Name column).

achievedPercentage.description: Achieved compliance percentage for this auditee (from Achieved Percentage column).

zoneName.description: Name of the zone (from Zone Name column).

lowComplianceAuditCount.description: Number of audit schedules in this zone where Achieved Percentage < 50%.
